name: Co-write with Vanessa on 'Mockingbird Lane'
notes: Block a morning at Silverbell to finish verse two and the bridge.

name: Confirm Copperline tracking dates for the EP
notes: Vanessa locked studio time with DT for the five-song demo.

name: Send Silverbell three songs for holds
notes: DT to bounce final demos for Vanessa to shop.

name: Confirm the Bluebird writers' round date
notes: Locked the in-the-round writers' night.

name: Demo vocal pass with Keisha on 'Two-Lane Heart'
notes: Keisha laid down the lead and a harmony stack.

name: Cut scratch tracks for EP song three
notes: DT to lay down scratch guitar and a guide vocal.

name: Update the pitch one-sheet for Vanessa
notes: Refresh the one-sheet with the new co-writes.

name: Line up sound for the New Harvest benefit show
notes: Terrell to handle monitors and the room mix.

name: Work up harmonies with the New Harvest choir
notes: Ran the new arrangement with Pastor Evelyn after Wednesday rehearsal.

name: Finalize the EP running order
notes: Settled the five-song order for the demo.

name: Master demo bounces for pitching
notes: Terrell to clean up levels on the pitch versions.

name: Rehearse the Magnolia set with Keisha
notes: Two run-throughs of the seven-song set.

name: Draft hook ideas for the next co-write
notes: Pull three hook ideas before the next session with Vanessa.

name: Get a second mix opinion from Hank
notes: Send Hank Beaumont the rough mixes for notes.

name: Send 'Borderline Sky' work tape to Carly
notes: Carly wants to hear the song she might cut.

name: Comp lead vocals on EP song two
notes: Pick the best vocal takes from the Copperline session.

name: Ask Evelyn about a choir feature on the hymn co-write
notes: See if the New Harvest choir can sing on the demo.

name: Send thank-you notes after the Magnolia show
notes: Quick notes to the band and the room.

name: Set up a writing day with Lisa Nakamura
notes: Find a date for a co-write at Lisa's place.

name: Pitch EP song five to Carly's team
notes: See if Carly wants first hold on the last song.
